section.heading: Grants by Secretary of the Interior to assist Indian tribes with respect to agreements for return of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: The Secretary of the Interior may make grants to Indian tribes to assist such tribes in reaching and carrying out agreements with—

paragraph.content: the Board of Regents for the return of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects under section 80q–9 of this title; and
other Federal and non-Federal entities for additional returns of Indian human remains and Indian funerary objects.

content.p: There is authorized to be appropriated $1,000,000 for fiscal year 1991 and such sums as may be necessary for succeeding fiscal years for grants under subsection (a).
